startPoint.en: Talk to the guards just outside of the Legends' Guild.
startPoint.es: Habla con los guardias justo fuera del Legends' Guild.

items.name: Papyrus
items.display: 3 papyrus (can be obtained during the quest)

items.name: Charcoal
items.display: 1 charcoal (can be obtained during the quest)

items.name: Unpowered orb
items.display: An unpowered orb (two if taking the easy way)

items.name: Gold bar
items.display: 2 gold bars (more recommended in case of smithing failure, metal bank does not work)

items.name: Clean ardrigal
items.display: Clean ardrigal and clean snake weed (can be obtained during the quest)

items.name: Opal
items.display: A cut opal, jade, red topaz, sapphire, emerald, ruby, and diamond

items.name: Charge Orb
items.display: Runes for two casts of any Charge Orb spell (bring more to be safe)

items.name: Lockpick
items.display: Lockpick, hair clip or a master thief's lockpick (tool belt works)

items.name: Rune hatchet
items.display: Unaugmented rune hatchet or better (tool belt works; the hatchet might have to be used on the item)

items.name: Runes, depending on your version of RuneScape:
items.display: Runes, depending on your version of RuneScape:

children.name: Soul rune
children.display: English: 1 soul, mind, earth, and 2 law runes

children.name: RuneScape Germany
children.display: German: 1 air, blood, nature, and 2 earth runes

children.name: RuneScape France
children.display: French: 1 law, air, death, mind, and blood rune

children.name: RuneScape Brazil
children.display: Portuguese: 1 fire, water, earth, air, and law rune

recommended.name: Prayer
recommended.display: 43 Prayer (highly recommended for Protect from Melee)

recommended.name: Ranged
recommended.display: 50 Ranged (if wielding holy water against Nezikchened)

recommended.name: Bittercap mushroom
recommended.display: 5 bittercap mushrooms to activate fairy ring CJS in the Kharazi Jungle

children.name: Portable fairy ring
children.display: Portable fairy ring for quick access to the jungle if you repair the fairy ring

recommended.name: Weapons
recommended.display: Weapon, armour, food and several prayer potions

recommended.name: Vial
recommended.display: 1-10 empty vials to be enchanted during the quest.

recommended.name: Silverlight
recommended.display: Silverlight or Darklight to weaken the demon

recommended.name: Beasts of Burden
recommended.display: A Beast of Burden to carry more items and save trips

rewards.name: Legends' Guild
rewards.display: Access to the Legends' Guild (including a shop to buy the cape of legends)

7,650 experience each in four skills of your choice amongst the following - Attack, Defence, Strength, Constitution, Prayer, Magic, Woodcutting, Crafting, Smithing, Herblore, Agility, and Thieving (You can choose the same skill multiple times if you wish)

rewards.name: Bull roarer
rewards.display: Bull roarer, used to summon Gujuo to bless more golden bowls

rewards.name: Dragon sq shield
rewards.display: Ability to wield a dragon square shield

rewards.name: Kharazi Jungle
rewards.display: Access to the Kharazi Jungle and red gecko pets

rewards.name: Chronicle, Book of legends
rewards.display: Chronicle, Book of legends pet (if not already unlocked)

rewards.name: Arise Legend
rewards.display: Arise Legend - Unlocked upon entering the Legends' Guild after completing the quest.

text.en: Talk to a Legends' guard at the Legends' Guild north-east of East Ardougne (fairy ring BLR).
text.es: Habla con un guardia de los Legends en el Legends' Guild al noreste de East Ardougne (anillo de las hadas BLR).

chatOptions: 3 Can I speak to someone in charge?
1 Can I go on the quest?
2 Yes, I'd like to talk to Grand Vizier Erkle.

text.en: Talk to Radimus Erkle.
text.es: Habla con Radimus Erkle.

chatOptions: 1 Yes actually, what's involved?
Accept

text.en: If required, take 3-5 papyrus from Radimus' table. Alternatively, Obli's General Store in the Shilo Village sells 10 papyrus as well.
text.es: Si es necesario, coge de 3 a 5 papiros de la mesa de Radimus. Alternativamente, el Obli's General Store en Shilo Village también vende 10 papiros.

text.en: Radimus notes, 3 papyrus, 1 charcoal
5 bittercap mushrooms
Chop-down the Jungle Trees/Bushes south of Shilo Village (fairy ring CKR) to access the Kharazi Jungle.
text.es: Tala los Jungle Trees/Bushes al sur de Shilo Village (anillo de las hadas CKR) para acceder a Kharazi Jungle.

text.en: Walk to the western edge of the jungle.
text.es: Camina hasta el borde occidental de la jungla.

text.en: Choose the Complete option on the Radimus notes in the backpack.
text.es: Elige la opción Complete en las notas de Radimus en la mochila.

text.en: Repeat in the centre of the jungle.
text.es: Repite en el centro de la jungla.

text.en: If you have completed A Fairy Tale II - Cure a Queen, repair fairy ring CJS with five bittercap mushrooms to make returning to the jungle easier.
text.es: Si has completado A Fairy Tale II - Cure a Queen, repara el anillo de las hadas CJS con cinco bittercap mushrooms para facilitar el regreso a la jungla.

highlightTerms: A Fairy Tale II - Cure a Queen

text.en: Repeat again on the eastern edge of the jungle.
text.es: Repite de nuevo en el borde oriental de la jungla.

text.en: Return north of the Jungle Trees using fairy ring CKR, or by chopping them down again.
text.es: Regresa al norte de los Jungle Trees usando el anillo de las hadas CKR, o talándolos de nuevo.

text.en: Use the notes on a jungle forester, south of Shilo Village.
text.es: Usa las notas en un jungle forester, al sur de Shilo Village.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, go ahead make a copy!

text.en: Radimus notes, bull roarer, lockpicks, the runes for your version of RuneScape (see the item requirements table above), opal, jade, red topaz, sapphire, emerald, ruby, diamond, and at least 4 backpack spaces.
Combat equipment to kill a lvl 77 Death wing

steps.caption: A map of the Viyeldi caves

text.en: Return to Kharazi Jungle (fairy ring CJS).
text.es: Regresa a Kharazi Jungle (anillo de las hadas CJS).

text.en: Swing the bull roarer to summon Gujuo, this may take several attempts.
text.es: Toca el bull roarer para invocar a Gujuo, esto puede requerir varios intentos.

text.en: Talk to him.
text.es: Habla con él.

chatOptions: 1 I was hoping to attract the attention of a native.
1 I want to develop friendly relationships with your people.
1 Can you get your people together?
1 What can we do instead then?
1 How do we make the totem pole?
1 I will release Ungadulu...

text.en: Search the mossy rocks in the north-west of the jungle to enter the Viyeldi caves , this may take several attempts.
text.es: Busca en las rocas cubiertas de musgo al noroeste de la jungla para entrar en las Viyeldi caves, esto puede requerir varios intentos.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, I'll crawl through, I'm very athletic.

text.en: Choose the Investigate option on the firewall.
text.es: Elige la opción Investigate en la pared de fuego.

chatOptions: 1 How can I extinguish the flames?
1 Where do I get pure water from?

text.en: Exit the cave via the Cave Exit.
text.es: Sal de la cueva por la Cave Exit.

text.en: Swing the Bull roarer to summon Gujuo.
text.es: Toca el Bull roarer para invocar a Gujuo.

text.en: Talk to him to get the sketch.
text.es: Habla con él para conseguir el boceto.

chatOptions: 3 I need some pure water to douse some magic flames.
5 Where is the pool of sacred water?
5 What kind of vessel?
2 Ok thanks for your help.

text.en: Re-enter the cave and choose the Search option on the eastern bookcase.
text.es: Vuelve a entrar en la cueva y elige la opción Search en la estantería oriental.

chatOptions: 1 Yes please!

text.en: Choose the Search on the Ancient Gate.
text.es: Elige Search en la Ancient Gate.

text.en: Smash-to-bits the three boulders.
text.es: Destruye por completo las tres rocas (Smash-to-bits).

text.en: Open the Ancient Gate.
text.es: Abre la Ancient Gate.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, I'm very strong, I'll force them open.

text.en: Move past the death wings.
text.es: Pasa junto a los death wings.

text.en: If you want to complete one of the hard Karamja achievements, you can kill a death wing here.
text.es: Si quieres completar uno de los logros difíciles de Karamja, puedes matar a un death wing aquí.

text.en: Choose the Jump-over option on the jagged wall.
text.es: Elige la opción Jump-over en la jagged wall.

text.en: Search the marked wall.
text.es: Busca en la marked wall.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, I'll read it.

text.en: Use your runes on it in order according to your version:
text.es: Usa tus runas en ella en orden según tu versión:

text.en: English: Soul, Mind, Earth, Law, Law.
text.es: Inglés: Soul, Mind, Earth, Law, Law.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, I'll go through!

text.en: German: Air, Earth, Blood, Earth, Nature.
text.es: Alemán: Air, Earth, Blood, Earth, Nature.

text.en: French: Law, Air, Death, Mind, Blood.
text.es: Francés: Law, Air, Death, Mind, Blood.

text.en: Portuguese: Fire, Water, Earth, Air, Law.
text.es: Portugués: Fire, Water, Earth, Air, Law.

text.en: If the chat option is not already offered, search the marked wall.
text.es: Si la opción de chat no aparece ya, busca en la marked wall.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, I'll go through!

text.en: Use (right click so you don't craft them) the cut gems on the carved rocks. Use the map to see which gem goes where.
text.es: Usa (clic derecho para no fabricarlas) las gemas talladas en las carved rocks. Usa el mapa para ver qué gema va en cada sitio.

text.en: Take the Binding book.
text.es: Coge el Binding book.

text.en: Radimus notes, empty vial, at least 2 gold bars, at least 100 prayer points, binding book, sketch, and bull roarer
Combat equipment (including Silverlight to weaken the demon)
Make sure you received a sketch from Gujuo, and use 2 gold bars on any anvil for a gold bowl. This may fail.
text.es: Asegúrate de haber recibido un boceto de Gujuo, y usa 2 gold bars en cualquier yunque para conseguir un gold bowl. Esto puede fallar.

text.en: Return to Kharazi Jungle (fairy ring CJS) and swing the bull roarer.
text.es: Regresa a Kharazi Jungle (anillo de las hadas CJS) y toca el bull roarer.

text.en: Talk to Gujuo.
text.es: Habla con Gujuo.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, I'd like you to bless my gold bowl.

text.en: Travel to the Water Pool (look for the tree icon on minimap).
text.es: Viaja hasta el Water Pool (busca el icono de árbol en el minimapa).

text.en: Choose the "Cut-Reed" option on the Tall Reeds next to it.
text.es: Elige la opción "Cut-Reed" en los Tall Reeds cercanos.

text.en: Use the acquired hollow reed on the Water Pool.
text.es: Usa el hollow reed obtenido en el Water Pool.

text.en: Choose the Enchant-Vials option on the binding book and create an enchanted vial .
text.es: Elige la opción Enchant-Vials en el binding book y crea un enchanted vial.

text.en: Use the hollow reed on the Water Pool again.
text.es: Usa el hollow reed en el Water Pool otra vez.

text.en: Return to the Viyeldi caves.
text.es: Regresa a las Viyeldi caves.

text.en: Use the golden bowl on the fire wall.
text.es: Usa el golden bowl en la fire wall.

text.en: Choose the Use option on the binding book on Ungadulu.
text.es: Elige la opción Use en el binding book sobre Ungadulu.

text.en: Kill Nezikchened. He will blast the player sometimes exceeding 2500 typeless damage when he dies.
text.es: Mata a Nezikchened. A veces te lanzará una explosión que puede superar los 2500 puntos de daño sin tipo cuando muera.

text.en: Choose the Talk-to option on Ungadulu.
text.es: Elige la opción Talk-to en Ungadulu.

chatOptions: 1 I need to collect some Yommi tree seeds for Gujuo.
1 How do I grow the Yommi tree?
1 What will you do now?
3 Okay, thanks...

text.en: Touch the Fire Wall.
text.es: Toca la Fire Wall.

text.en: Exit the cave.
text.es: Sal de la cueva.

text.en: Use the Golden bowl on the seeds.
text.es: Usa el Golden bowl en las semillas.

text.en: Use the seeds on a patch of fertile soil. There's a patch above the pool. This will fail to plant the seeds.
text.es: Usa las semillas en una parcela de tierra fértil. Hay una parcela encima de la piscina. Esto fallará al plantar las semillas.

text.en: Return to the pool and Use the Hollow reed on it. The water will be dried up.
text.es: Regresa a la piscina y usa el Hollow reed en ella. El agua se habrá secado.

text.en: Swing the Bull roarer and Talk to Gujuo.
text.es: Toca el Bull roarer y habla con Gujuo.

chatOptions: 1 The water pool has dried up and I need more water.
2 Where is the source of the spring of pure water?
2 If I went, could you help me?
5 Ok thanks for your help.

text.en: Radimus notes, clean ardrigal and clean snake weed (or two free inventory slots to obtain during quest), vial of water, runes and unpowered orb for any Charge Orb spell, an unpowered orb, blessed gold bowl, hollow reed, yommi tree seeds, a lockpick, a rope, and a non-augmented rune hatchet (alternatively, dragon hatchet or better) in the backpack (not tool belt).
Combat equipment, food, and spare items for Charge Orb (if you die you have to cast again to open door)
Switch to the standard spellbook if you are not already on it.
text.es: Cambia al libro de hechizos estándar si no lo tienes ya seleccionado.

text.en: Collect the herbs using the maps below.
text.es: Recoge las hierbas usando los mapas de abajo.

text.en: Search palm trees for grimy ardrigal.
text.es: Busca en las palm trees para conseguir grimy ardrigal.

text.en: Search marshy jungle vines for grimy snake weed.
text.es: Busca en las marshy jungle vines para conseguir grimy snake weed.

text.en: Clean the herbs.
text.es: Limpia las hierbas.

text.en: Use the clean ardrigal and clean snake weed on a vial of water for a bravery potion.
text.es: Usa el clean ardrigal y el clean snake weed en un vial de agua para conseguir una bravery potion.

text.en: Return to the Viyeldi caves.
text.es: Regresa a las Viyeldi caves.

text.en: Traverse the dungeon as before to where you found the Binding book:
text.es: Atraviesa la mazmorra como antes hasta donde encontraste el Binding book:

text.en: Search the eastern Bookcase.
text.es: Busca en la estantería oriental.

text.en: Choose the Search option on the Ancient Gate.
text.es: Elige la opción Search en la Ancient Gate.

text.en: Smash-to-bits the three Boulders.
text.es: Destruye por completo los tres Boulders (Smash-to-bits).

text.en: Open the Ancient Gate.
text.es: Abre la Ancient Gate.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, I'm very strong, I'll force them open.

text.en: Move past the Death wings.
text.es: Pasa junto a los Death wings.

text.en: Choose the Jump-over option on Jagged wall.
text.es: Elige la opción Jump-over en el Jagged wall.

text.en: Use the Marked wall.
text.es: Usa la Marked wall.

text.en: Cast a Charge Orb spell on the north Ancient Gate.
text.es: Lanza el hechizo Charge Orb en la Ancient Gate norte.

text.en: Use the Rope on the Winch.
text.es: Usa la Rope en el Winch.

text.en: If you forgot your rope, you can smash the barrels in the room for one.
text.es: Si olvidaste tu cuerda, puedes destrozar los barriles de la sala para conseguir una.

text.en: Drink the bravery potion.
text.es: Bebe la bravery potion.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, I'll bravely drink the bravery potion.

text.en: Search and then climb-down the Winch.
text.es: Busca y luego desciende (climb-down) por el Winch.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, I'll shimmy down the rope into possible doom.

text.en: Climb-over the rocky ledges and rocks to reach the bottom.
text.es: Sube sobre las repisas rocosas y rocas para llegar al fondo.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, I can think of nothing more exciting!
1 Yes, I can think of nothing more exciting!
1 Yes, I can think of nothing more exciting!
1 Yes, I want to climb over the rocks.
1 Yes, I want to climb over the rocks.
1 Yes, I want to climb over the rocks.

text.en: Kill the 3 different skeletons until you get 3 crystal pieces (Hunk, Chunk, and Lump):
text.es: Mata a los 3 esqueletos diferentes hasta obtener 3 piezas de cristal (Hunk, Chunk y Lump):

text.en: San Tojalon
text.es: San Tojalon

text.en: Irvig Senay
text.es: Irvig Senay

text.en: Ranalph Devere
text.es: Ranalph Devere

text.en: Use each crystal on the north-east furnace.
text.es: Usa cada cristal en el horno del noreste.

text.en: Use the heart crystal on the searchable mossy rock in the middle of the room.
text.es: Usa el heart crystal en la roca cubierta de musgo registrable en el centro de la sala.

text.en: Run south and use the heart crystal on the recess next to the shimmering field.
text.es: Corre hacia el sur y usa el heart crystal en el hueco junto al shimmering field.

text.en: Walk-through the shimmering field.
text.es: Atraviesa el shimmering field.

text.en: West past the lesser demons, push any of the boulders.
text.es: Al oeste, pasando a los lesser demons, empuja cualquiera de las rocas.

chatOptions: any
1 What can I do about that?
1 I'll do what I must to get the water.
1 Ok, I'll do it.

text.en: Return to the start of the cavern, back past the shimmering field and Rocks.
text.es: Regresa al inicio de la caverna, pasando de nuevo por el shimmering field y las rocas.

text.en: Equip the dark dagger.
text.es: Equípate la dark dagger.

text.en: Take the blue hat.
text.es: Coge el blue hat.

text.en: Kill Viyeldi.
text.es: Mata a Viyeldi.

text.en: You will need to Attack him during the dialogue as he will disappear after completing the dialogue.
text.es: Necesitarás atacarlo durante el diálogo, ya que desaparecerá al completarse el diálogo.

text.en: Re-equip your preferred weapon.
text.es: Vuelve a equiparte tu arma preferida.

text.en: Return to the boulders and push one.
text.es: Regresa a las rocas y empuja una.

text.en: Kill Nezikchened.
text.es: Mata a Nezikchened.

text.en: Push all three boulders.
text.es: Empuja las tres rocas.

text.en: All three must be pushed while standing on the east side of them.
text.es: Las tres deben empujarse estando de pie en el lado este de ellas.

text.en: If one does not move, push it from a different angle.
text.es: Si alguna no se mueve, empújala desde otro ángulo.

text.en: Return to Kharazi Jungle (fairy ring CJS).
text.es: Regresa a Kharazi Jungle (anillo de las hadas CJS).

text.en: Use the hollow reed on the water pool. The following steps must be done relatively quickly, as the sapling will die or totem will rot extremely quickly if left unattended.
text.es: Usa el hollow reed en el water pool. Los siguientes pasos deben hacerse con relativa rapidez, ya que el retoño morirá o el tótem se pudrirá muy rápido si se deja desatendido.

text.en: Choose the Use option on the yommi tree seeds on the dark brown soil just north-west of the pool, it will appear as Fertile Soil.
text.es: Elige la opción Use en las yommi tree seeds sobre la tierra marrón oscura justo al noroeste de la piscina, aparecerá como Fertile Soil.

text.en: Use the golden bowl on it once it stops growing.
text.es: Usa el golden bowl en él una vez que deje de crecer.

text.en: Chop the adult yommi tree.
text.es: Tala el yommi tree adulto.

text.en: Trim the felled yommi tree.
text.es: Poda el yommi tree talado.

text.en: Carve the trimmed yommi.
text.es: Talla el yommi podado.

text.en: Lift the totem pole.
text.es: Levanta el totem pole.

text.en: Yommi totem, Radimus notes, bull roarer
Weapons, armour, food
Use your Yommi totem on the Totem Pole east of the pool.
text.es: Usa tu Yommi totem en el Totem Pole al este de la piscina.

text.en: Defeat Nezikchened and the three skeletons.
text.es: Derrota a Nezikchened y a los tres esqueletos.

text.en: He will appear four times, with a skeleton spawning between each kill.
text.es: Aparecerá cuatro veces, con un esqueleto apareciendo entre cada muerte.

text.en: Use the Yommi totem on the Totem Pole again.
text.es: Usa el Yommi totem en el Totem Pole otra vez.

text.en: Talk to Gujuo to receive the gilded totem.
text.es: Habla con Gujuo para recibir el gilded totem.

text.en: Return to the Legends' Guild (fairy ring BLR).
text.es: Regresa al Legends' Guild (anillo de las hadas BLR).

text.en: Talk to Radimus.
text.es: Habla con Radimus.

text.en: Talk to him again inside the guild.
text.es: Habla con él de nuevo dentro del gremio.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, I'll train now.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
